message:
chore: update a2a and multi-plugin to use version branches

Updated a2a and multi-plugin latest versions to point to dedicated
version branches instead of main, enabling proper edit link detection.

- a2a: docs/a2a/0.1.0
- multi-plugin: docs/multi-plugin/0.1.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
